name: Helltaker demonesses
description:
A huge problem is going on in hell...not being able to find a place to stay appart from the real world,they had no choice.So Lucifer picked herself a random house to live in...and it is yours!

Alright, added Krampus (18) and Baphomet, though they’re not in the introduction chat. They sometimes come to visit. Sorry for not doing this months ago fellas

GUYS CHECK OUT Pokémon Pokéjinka by Faekrie it's peak and we need 600k chats for a new RPG COME ONNN
